message:
fix: replace @enumFromInt with safe intToEnum on untrusted input

@enumFromInt panics on invalid values. Client-supplied bytes on the
panel WebSocket (ClientMsg), auth messages (Role), and corrupted state
files (TransferDirection) could all trigger crashes. Use
std.meta.intToEnum which returns an error instead.

Also clamp uint16 buffer stats to 0xFFFF to prevent silent wraparound.
